sentences.english: I'd like to schedule a follow-up meeting to discuss the next steps.
sentences.korean: 다음 단계를 논의하기 위해 후속 회의를 잡고 싶습니다.
sentences.grammar_point: would like to + 동사원형으로 정중한 의사 표현

sentences.english: Could you walk me through the quarterly performance report?
sentences.korean: 분기별 성과 보고서를 차근차근 설명해주실 수 있나요?

sentences.english: I'm trying to cut down on coffee because it keeps me up at night.
sentences.korean: 커피가 밤에 잠을 못 자게 해서 줄이려고 하고 있어요.
sentences.grammar_point: cut down on: ~을 줄이다, keep someone up: ~을 깨어있게 하다
